classes.description: This provides the base rich text class for all iWork applications.
classes.name: rich text

properties.description: The color of the font. Expressed as an RGB value consisting of a list of three color values from 0 to 65535. ex: Blue = {0, 0, 65535}.
properties.name: color

properties.description: The name of the font.  Can be the PostScript name, such as: “TimesNewRomanPS-ItalicMT”, or display name: “Times New Roman Italic”. TIP: Use the Font Book application get the information about a typeface.
properties.name: font

properties.description: The size of the font.
properties.name: size

properties.description: A list of the currently selected items.
properties.name: selection

properties.description: Whether the document is password protected or not.
properties.name: password protected

properties.description: The height of the iWork item.
properties.name: height

properties.description: Whether the object is locked.
properties.name: locked

properties.description: The iWork container containing this iWork item.
properties.name: parent

properties.description: The horizontal and vertical coordinates of the top left point of the iWork item.
properties.name: position

properties.description: The width of the iWork item.
properties.name: width

properties.description: The name of the audio file.
properties.name: file name

properties.description: The volume setting for the audio clip, from 0 (none) to 100 (full volume).
properties.name: clip volume

properties.description: If or how the audio clip repeats.
properties.name: repetition method

properties.description: The background, if any, for the shape.
properties.name: background fill type

properties.description: The text contained within the shape.
properties.name: object text

properties.description: Is the iWork item displaying a reflection?
properties.name: reflection showing

properties.description: The percentage of reflection of the iWork item, from 0 (none) to 100 (full).
properties.name: reflection value

properties.description: The rotation of the iWork item, in degrees from 0 to 359.
properties.name: rotation

properties.description: The opacity of the object, in percent.
properties.name: opacity

properties.description: Text associated with the image, read aloud by VoiceOver.
properties.name: description

properties.description: The image file.
properties.name: file

properties.description: The name of the image file.
properties.name: file name

properties.description: The opacity of the object, in percent.
properties.name: opacity

properties.description: Is the iWork item displaying a reflection?
properties.name: reflection showing

properties.description: The percentage of reflection of the iWork item, from 0 (none) to 100 (full).
properties.name: reflection value

properties.description: The rotation of the iWork item, in degrees from 0 to 359.
properties.name: rotation

properties.description: The height of the iWork item.
properties.name: height

properties.description: The iWork container containing this iWork item.
properties.name: parent

properties.description: The horizontal and vertical coordinates of the top left point of the iWork item.
properties.name: position

properties.description: The width of the iWork item.
properties.name: width

properties.description: The rotation of the iWork item, in degrees from 0 to 359.
properties.name: rotation

properties.description: A list of two numbers indicating the horizontal and vertical position of the line ending point.
properties.name: end point

properties.description: Is the iWork item displaying a reflection?
properties.name: reflection showing

properties.description: The percentage of reflection of the iWork item, from 0 (none) to 100 (full).
properties.name: reflection value

properties.description: The rotation of the iWork item, in degrees from 0 to 359.
properties.name: rotation

properties.description: A list of two numbers indicating the horizontal and vertical position of the line starting point.
properties.name: start point

properties.description: The name of the movie file.
properties.name: file name

properties.description: The volume setting for the movie, from 0 (none) to 100 (full volume).
properties.name: movie volume

properties.description: The opacity of the object, in percent.
properties.name: opacity

properties.description: Is the iWork item displaying a reflection?
properties.name: reflection showing

properties.description: The percentage of reflection of the iWork item, from 0 (none) to 100 (full).
properties.name: reflection value

properties.description: If or how the movie repeats.
properties.name: repetition method

properties.description: The rotation of the iWork item, in degrees from 0 to 359.
properties.name: rotation

properties.description: The item's name.
properties.name: name

properties.description: The range describing every cell in the table.
properties.name: cell range

properties.description: The cells currently selected in the table.
properties.name: selection range

properties.description: The number of rows in the table.
properties.name: row count

properties.description: The number of columns in the table.
properties.name: column count

properties.description: The number of header rows in the table.
properties.name: header row count

properties.description: The number of header columns in the table.
properties.name: header column count

properties.description: The number of footer rows in the table.
properties.name: footer row count

properties.description: The background, if any, for the text item.
properties.name: background fill type

properties.description: The text contained within the text item.
properties.name: object text

properties.description: The opacity of the object, in percent.
properties.name: opacity

properties.description: Is the iWork item displaying a reflection?
properties.name: reflection showing

properties.description: The percentage of reflection of the iWork item, from 0 (none) to 100 (full).
properties.name: reflection value

properties.description: The rotation of the iWork item, in degrees from 0 to 359.
properties.name: rotation

classes.description: A range of cells in a table
classes.name: range

properties.description: The font of the range's cells.
properties.name: font name

properties.description: The font size of the range's cells.
properties.name: font size

properties.description: The format of the range's cells.
properties.name: format

properties.description: The horizontal alignment of content in the range's cells.
properties.name: alignment

properties.description: The range's coordinates.
properties.name: name

properties.description: The text color of the range's cells.
properties.name: text color

properties.description: Whether text should wrap in the range's cells.
properties.name: text wrap

properties.description: The background color of the range's cells.
properties.name: background color

properties.description: The vertical alignment of content in the range's cells.
properties.name: vertical alignment

properties.description: The cell's column.
properties.name: column

properties.description: The cell's row.
properties.name: row

properties.description: The actual value in the cell, or missing value if the cell is empty.
properties.name: value

properties.description: The formatted value in the cell, or missing value if the cell is empty.
properties.name: formatted value

properties.description: The formula in the cell, as text, e.g. =SUM(40+2). If the cell does not contain a formula, returns missing value. To set the value of a cell to a formula as text, use the value property.
properties.name: formula

classes.description: A row of cells in a table
classes.name: row

properties.description: The row's index in the table (e.g., the second row has address 2).
properties.name: address

properties.description: The height of the row.
properties.name: height

classes.description: A column of cells in a table
classes.name: column

properties.description: The column's index in the table (e.g., the second column has address 2).
properties.name: address

properties.description: The width of the column.
properties.name: width

commands.description: Sets the value of the specified object(s).
commands.name: set

parameters.description: The class of the new object.
parameters.name: new

parameters.description: The location at which to insert the object.
parameters.name: at

parameters.description: The initial contents of the object.
parameters.name: with data

parameters.description: The initial values for properties of the object.
parameters.name: with properties

commands.description: Clear the contents of a specified range of cells, including formatting and style.
commands.name: clear

commands.description: Merge a specified range of cells.
commands.name: merge

commands.description: Sort the rows of the table.
commands.name: sort

parameters.description: Limit the sort to the specified rows.
parameters.name: in rows

commands.description: Unmerge all merged cells in a specified range.
commands.name: unmerge

commands.description: Set a password to an unencrypted document.
commands.name: set password

parameters.description: The document to set a password to. If unspecified, the current target is assumed.
parameters.name: to

parameters.description: Whether to save the password in keychain or not. By default, the password is not saved in the keychain.
parameters.name: saving in keychain

commands.description: Remove the password from the document.

direct_parameter.description: The current password of the document.

commands.name: remove password

parameters.description: The document from which to remove the password. If unspecified, the current target is assumed.
parameters.name: from

properties.description: Document ID.
properties.name: id

properties.description: The template assigned to the document.
properties.name: document template

properties.description: The active sheet.
properties.name: active sheet

properties.description: The sheet's name.
properties.name: name

properties.description: Whether the table is currently filtered.
properties.name: filtered

properties.description: Whether header rows are frozen.
properties.name: header rows frozen

properties.description: Whether header columns are frozen.
properties.name: header columns frozen

properties.description: The identifier used by the application.
properties.name: id

properties.description: The localized name displayed to the user.
properties.name: name

commands.description: Transpose the rows and columns of the table.
commands.name: transpose

commands.description: Export a document to another file
commands.name: export

commands.description: Add a column to the table after a specified range of cells.
commands.name: add column after

commands.description: Add a column to the table before a specified range of cells.
commands.name: add column before

commands.description: Add a row to the table below a specified range of cells.
commands.name: add row above

commands.description: Add a row to the table below a specified range of cells.
commands.name: add row below

commands.description: Remove specified rows or columns from a table.
commands.name: remove
